artPrompt: A widescreen film-still of a towering humming elemental of pure sound coalescing above a town green, its translucent body made of vibrating air, dust, and concentric pressure rings rippling outward over a transfixed crowd below, golden afternoon light refracting through the shimmering distortion; picket fences and folding tables tremble in the haze beneath the relentless droning presence, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: the vote is become loud
text:
the people do be voting. they vote on what. they vote on yes. the yes wins. it always win.
whenever anyone count anything — votes, dice, coins, snacks, the years since the last good mayor — the vote is become loud and it count too, but louder, and wrong, and the count is now this card's idea.
frontrunner sit down. frontrunner is recalled into a feeling. the feeling is being recalled.
flavorText: democracy, but it learned to hum, and now it will not stop humming.
